prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-ASRT-3PCTHROWSETSHARK-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 3pc Shark Ninja 6.5" Full Tang Throwing Knives Set, Martial Art Knife Throwers, Matte Black Description: Whether you view knife throwing as an competitive art form or casual weekend hobby to get together with friends over, this ASR Tactical three piece throwing knives set will get the job done. This set may not qualify as tournament grade professional throwing knives, but they are suitable for all beginners and experienced hobbyists alike. The throwing knives are are well balanced, but just ever so slightly handle heavy; and, while the intended purpose of this knife set is definitely throwing, the knives can also double for general fixed blade usage, hence the double quillons for protection and handling, as well as serrated edge for cutting if needed.

Throwing knives should definitely be full tang in design for longevity, which these are. They feature a 3 inch blade and 3 inch handle, totaling for a 6 inch unibody throwing knife. The knives are made from durable, quality stainless steel and feature a smooth black matte finish. The blades on these throwing knives are a spear like or dagger shape, with asymmetrical widths ending in a sharp pointed tip. Lastly, the handle features a slight indent down the middle for texture when handling and an improved grip.

OK, now we have to mention the unique shark design, which you'll find referenced throughout the whole knife. The quillons while purposeful in design, look like shark fins; the cut out eye and gill shapes enhance the shark design even further but these blade holes help with aerodynamics when it comes to actually throwing the knives. If you love sharks, or know an avid knife throwing outdoorsman or woman who does, this would make a seriously awesome and thoughtful gift.

Lastly, the ASR Tactical knife throwing set comes with a perfectly fitted handy nylon knife sheath with Velcro closure, to keep knives secure and in place when not in use; the knife sheath also features a back tunnel loop for belt loop or other on or off person carrying options depending on the carriers preference Search Terms: knives martial arts self defense hobby hunting fishing camping multitool throwing knife set target practice EDC tactical knife ninja bug out bag prepper supplies tools fixed blade knife spear dagger knife sports and outdoors Features: - SET OF 3 THROWING KNIVES: This 3pc throwing knives set from ASR Tactical are well balanced, but just ever so slightly handle heavy; while the intented purpose of this knife set is throwing, the knives can also come in handy for general fixed blade usage, hence the quillons for protection and handling, as well as serrated edge for cutting if needed - STAINLESS STEEL FULL TANG THROWING KNIFES: The knife set is made from quality durable stainless steel with a smooth black matte finish; the throwing knives weigh in at 0.10lbs each, are full tang in design, feature a 3 inch blade and 3 inch handle, a sharp spear like or dagger shaped pointed blade and a slightly indented handle for improved grip - UNIQUE SHARK DESIGN: The unique feature of these throwing knives is the shark shape design; The unique feature of these throwing knives is the shark shape design; while the cut out eye and gill shapes enhance the shark design, the blade holes help with aerodynamics when it comes to actually throwing these knives - KNIFE SHEATH INCLUDED: This knife set comes with a handy nylon perfectly fitted knife sheath with Velcro closure to keep knives secure and in place when not in use; the knife sheath also features a tunnel loop for belt loop or other on or off person carrying options - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.5 x 1.5 x 0.125 inches; Material: Stainless Steel; Finish: Matte; Color: Black; Weight: 0.35lbs; Individual Knife Weight: 0.10lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
